testcase.name: clienteAcessaPedidoProprioMasNaoPedidoDeOutroCliente()

failure.message: org.assertj.core.util.introspection.IntrospectionError: Can't find any field or property with name 'error'. Error when introspecting properties was : - No getter for property 'error' in com.raizesdonordeste.backend.exception.BusinessException Error when introspecting fields was : - Unable to obtain the value of the field <'error'> from <com.raizesdonordeste.backend.exception.BusinessException: O usuario autenticado nao possui permissao para esta operacao.>
